title: No Worldgen 5 You Continued
description: This fork provides patches for OTG, fixes some spelling mistakes in the code, fixes performance issues and adds more features to disable from the world.
body:
This fork provides patches for OTG, fixes some spelling mistakes in the code, fixes performance issues and adds more features to disable from the world such as:

**Populators** (small-scale features):
* Animals
* Dungeons
* Fire
* Glowstone
* Ice
* Lakes
* Lava (surface pools)
* Nether lava
* Secondary nether lava
* Nether magma

**Structures** (large-scale world generation):
* Caves
* End cities
* Mineshafts
* Nether bridges
* Nether caves
* Ocean monuments
* Ravines
* Scattered features (enables disabling of substructures below)
* Strongholds
* Villages
* Woodland mansions

**Scattered structures** (requires scattered features to be disabled):
* Desert pyramids
* Igloos
* Jungle temples
* Witch huts
